title: henckelia battamensis
intro: Henckelia battamensis is a species of plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the Borneo toothed leaves plant due to its distinctive toothed leaves. Traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, Henckelia battamensis has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an anti-oxidant. In herbal preparations, Henckelia battamensis is typically used in infusions or decoctions, and can also be made into a tea or powder for medicinal purposes.
